author: y4rr
content: Plan: Add a 25th workspace crate ferrotorch-diffusion implementing the SD-1.5 VAE decoder only (latent [B,4,64,64] -> image [B,3,512,512]). Architecture: conv_in(4->512) + UNetMidBlock2D(resnets + 1 attn @ 512ch) + 4 UpBlock2D (resnets + nearest-2x upsample, no upsample on last) + GroupNorm(32) + SiLU + conv_out(128->3). Reuse ferrotorch-nn primitives: Conv2d, GroupNorm, Linear, SiLU, Dropout, Upsample (nearest). Add ResnetBlock2D, AttnBlock2D, Upsample2D in blocks.rs. Pin script grabs vae/ subfolder of runwayml/stable-diffusion-v1-5, generates deterministic latent + reference image fixtures, uploads to HF ferrotorch/sd-v1-5-vae-decoder. TOL: cosine_sim>=0.999, max_abs<=0.5. No encoder, no UNet, no text encoder — out of scope.
